item.title: Upper A — Push Day
item.description:
First Upper A session of the week. Shoulder press feels like 30kg is the current ceiling — need to work up to 6 clean reps before adding weight. Incline bench reps too low, dropping to 35kg next session and building volume properly.

Face pulls at 35kg for 7 reps — rear delts responding well.

Overall energy was good despite sleeping at 2AM. Morning walk done before session.
